_comment: Pretty Kit — Tauri Window Configuration Snippet
_instructions: Copy the object inside 'windows' into the 'windows' array of your tauri.conf.json.
For Tauri 2.x the key is 'app.windows'. For Tauri 1.x it is 'tauri.windows'.
Transparent support requires the 'macos-private-api' feature on macOS
and the 'transparent' Cargo feature on Windows (see README).

windows.label: main
windows.title: Pretty Kit
windows._note_macOS: Add 'macOS: { privateApi: true }' at the app level to enable transparency on macOS.
windows._note_linux: Transparency on Linux requires a compositor (e.g. picom). Set transparent:false if unsupported.
windows._note_windows: Add the 'transparent' feature to tauri in Cargo.toml: tauri = { features = ['transparent'] }

_tauri2_placement._description: In tauri.conf.json for Tauri 2.x, nest windows under 'app':

_tauri1_placement._description: In tauri.conf.json for Tauri 1.x, nest windows under 'tauri':

_cargo_toml_features._description: Add these features to your Cargo.toml for full support:
